2026-04-24T22:39:58.2878055Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/7d374859-9ba5-4ba9-824d-a49c65f32437' before making global git config changes
2026-04-24T22:39:58.2879272Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-04-24T22:39:58.2884620Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net
2026-04-24T22:39:58.2919150Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-24T22:39:58.2926107Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-24T22:39:58.2962463Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-24T22:39:58.3325544Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-24T22:39:58.3331116Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-24T22:39:58.3371540Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-24T22:39:58.3699003Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-24T22:39:58.3706823Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-24T22:39:58.3743306Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
